---
title: "semantic.ts"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\pennyone\intel\semantic.ts"
loc: 155
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.92
intel_score: 3.81
overall_score: 2.41
---

## Intent
The `semantic.ts` module implements the 'Semantic Indexer' (v2.0). It transitions the engine from simple string matching to true symbol-aware analysis, using Tree-sitter to map definition-to-usage patterns across multiple files and languages.

## Interaction Protocol
Instantiate the `SemanticIndexer` class and invoke the `index` method to perform a cross-file symbol analysis. It also provides the `focusSymbol` method for surgical extraction of specific code definitions.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [getParser](file://../parser.ts)
- [TreeSitter](file://../parser.ts)
- [crawlRepository](file://../crawler.ts)
- [*](file://node:fs/promises)
- [*](file://node:path)

### Exports
- `Map`
- `SemanticIndexer`
- `files`
- `results`
- `symbols`
- `data`
- `absPath`
- `code`
- `getParser`
- `tree`
- `patterns`
- `query`
- `matches`
- `nameCapture`
- `symbolCapture`
- `absPath`
- `code`
- `getParser`
- `tree`
- `symbols`
- `patterns`
- `query`
- `matches`
- `absPath`
- `code`
- `getParser`
- `tree`
- `dependencies`
- `symbolsOccurred`
- `stack`
- `node`
- `paths`
- `i`
- `child`
